text.title: Vision Applications — Output Contract
text.summary: Per-task output schemas: document (fields dict), classify (category + confidence), moderate (is_safe + flags + severity + needs_human_review). Common metadata: provider, model, cache_key, retries.

section.title: JSON Schema — task=classify
section.code: { "$id": "faion://vision-applications/classify.schema.json", "type": "object", "required": ["status", "task", "category", "confidence", "reasoning", "provider", "model", "cache_key"], "properties": { "status": {"type": "string", "enum": ["ok", "error"]}, "task": {"const": "classify"}, "category": {"type": "string", "description": "must be member of provided categories list, lowercased"}, "confidence": {"type": "number", "minimum": 0.0, "maximum": 1.0}, "reasoning": {"type": "string"}, "provider": {"type": "string", "enum": ["openai", "anthropic", "google"]}, "model": {"type": "string"}, "cache_key": {"type": "string", "pattern": "^[a-f0-9]{64}$"}, "cached": {"type": "boolean"} } }

antipattern.reason: Violates rule r4-normalize-categorical; breaks downstream enum routing.
Violates rule r6-human-review-threshold; risk of policy-violation reaching production.

antipattern.description: category in classify task NOT in the supplied categories list.
antipattern.reason: Model invented a category; downstream router has no branch for it.

example.note: Invalid: severity not lowercased; confidence below threshold but needs_human_review false; cache_key not sha256.

list.item: severity / category / status are lowercase enum members.
For moderate: confidence < 0.7 OR severity in {medium, high} → needs_human_review must be true.
For classify: category in caller-supplied categories list.
